learning_objectives: Explain the proposed mechanisms of photobiomodulation relevant to pain management
Identify appropriate clinical indications and patient selection criteria
Apply photobiomodulation principles to case-based clinical decision-making
Recognize safety considerations, contraindications, and common misuse patterns
Integrate photobiomodulation appropriately into a multimodal pain management plan
high_priority_objectives: Apply photobiomodulation principles to case-based clinical decision-making
Recognize safety considerations, contraindications, and common misuse patterns
mastery_threshold_note: Learners must demonstrate adequate mastery of high-priority objectives to pass. Shallow coverage of safety and application is the most common failure mode.
